---
name: Feature request / new skill
about: Suggest a feature or a new skill/command
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What skill or feature would you like?**
e.g. unit conversions, dictionary, reminders, music control.

**Example phrasing**
What would the user type or say? (“convert 10 km to miles”)

**Constraints**
Pglu is local-first and key-less — features should use the stdlib or free, no-key public APIs.

**Additional context**
References, examples.
